title: Polymarket crypto/gold strike ladders as implied-distribution features + exogenous finance series (CPI, Hormuz)
source: CEO question 2026-06-12 (post-B0170): Polymarket has crypto and finance sections — can we use them? Gamma tag probe same day.
why: Probe findings (2026-06-12): the crypto section is dominated by PRICE-DERIVATIVE ladders on exactly our assets — recurring series btc/ethereum/solana-multi-strikes-weekly (11 strikes), *-hit-price-{daily,weekly,monthly}, *-up-or-down-daily — and the SAME families exist for GOLD (gold-gc-above, gold-hit-price-weekly, gold-daily-up-or-down) and SPY. As DIRECTIONAL signals these are circular (mechanically reprice with spot; B0170 already showed even exogenous FOMC odds do not lead daily returns). The non-obvious value: an 11-strike ladder is a risk-neutral CDF -> implied vol / skew / P(tail) per horizon — options-implied data we otherwise lack for crypto AND gold, mapping to our variance-control posture (Best Sharpe) rather than to direction. Separately, the finance/economy tags carry genuinely EXOGENOUS recurring series with better causal hygiene: us-monthly-inflation / us-annual-inflation (CPI print buckets, stitchable like fomc), fed-rate-hike, hormuz-traffic-returns-to-normal (live geopolitical XAU driver), crude-oil-cl-hit. TIME-SENSITIVE: daily/weekly strike markets resolve constantly and degrade to 12h fidelity on resolution — archival value decays daily.
value_rationale: M: orthogonal implied-vol surface for 4 of our 8 assets is novel and posture-aligned, but unproven; direction is expected null (B0170 prior); freeze Jun 21 makes any strategy use this cycle unlikely — main near-term value is cheap archival before markets resolve.
scope: ARCHIVE NOW (config-only, zero new code): add to configs/polymarket.yaml as kind:series targets — btc/ethereum/solana-multi-strikes-weekly, gold-gc-above or gold-hit-price-weekly, us-monthly-inflation, hormuz-traffic-returns-to-normal; no outcome_map (slugified strike buckets); verify ingest wall-time stays sane

ANALYSIS (new code, post-archive): strike parser ($104,000 -> 104000) + risk-neutral CDF builder -> pm implied mean/var/skew per asset/horizon; cross vs realized vol (variance-risk-premium-style gap), NOT direction
CPI series: generic bucket stitcher (fomc stitcher is cut/nochange/hike-specific) + event-time study around print dates
Pre-registered criteria BEFORE any analysis run, B0170-style (BH on full grid, contemporaneous controls)
out_of_scope: Any directional signal claim from price-derivative markets (circular); any strategy/live wiring (CEO-reserved, freeze Jun 21 22:00 BST); websocket; SPY/equities (not in our asset universe).

history.reason: Spawned from CEO question on Polymarket crypto/finance sections; grounded in live Gamma tag probe.

Archive phase (scope item 1) DONE 2026-06-12: live_only discovery flag added (TDD), 7 new config targets (btc/eth/sol/gold weekly strike ladders live_only, us-monthly-inflation + fed-rate-hike full incl. resolved, hormuz live_only). First ingest: 481 markets total, 1.3 min wall — daily B0172 cadence refreshes all. CPI series has 16 resolved prints (2025-01 -> 2026-06) for the phase-2 event-time study. Strict parse clean across all label families.
docs(B0174): design â€” Polymarket implied-dispersion extractor + VRP kill-test (phase 2)

Phase-2 kill-test COMPLETE 2026-06-12. Built observed-support quantile extractor (pipeline/alt_data/polymarket_strikes.py: PAVA monotonization, PCHIP/linear quantile inversion with NaN-outside-band, IPR/Bowley/P(|move|>x), bucket+above-ladder formats; 30 tests) per quant-phd-advisor methodology (no moments, no tail extrapolation). Backfilled 87 resolved crypto ladders/asset. VERDICT = FAIL_BUT_SIGNAL_PRESENT: implied dispersion correlates with next-period realized vol (Spearman +0.328, p=0.001, n=97 pooled BTC/ETH/SOL) AND out-ranks trailing historical vol (+0.240) AND beats the longshot-bias placebo (+0.127) -- so NOT a microstructure artifact. BUT not incremental: OLS |move|~ipr+histvol gives ipr p=0.63 (collinear with histvol). Pre-registered gate required incremental contribution -> KILL. Implied dispersion is at best a SUBSTITUTE for historical vol here, not a complement; n=97 short-dated crypto cannot establish even that decisively. Gold = descriptive panel n=3 (terminal gc-settle-at buckets), no claim, weekend resolution dates give degenerate moves. Production config corrected: gold_strikes(barrier) -> gold_settle(terminal). Possible follow-up (CEO-reserved): implied-as-substitute monitor for sizing, NOT a pipeline complement.
Phase-2 kill-test answered the question: signal present but not incremental over historical vol -> no pipeline use. Honest negative, gate not passed.
feat(B0174): phase-2 implied-dispersion extractor + VRP kill-test â€” honest negative (signal present, not incremental)

Exploratory follow-up (CEO-requested, POST-HOC not pre-registered) on whether implied dispersion helps SIZING where the average-rank kill-test could not see: tail detection + forward-looking. Result: NO actionable edge. Tail-detection AUC implied 0.684 vs historical 0.651 but residualized-vs-historical collapses to 0.539 (~coin flip). Forward-looking hypothesis (implied elevated vs historical -> bigger move) REFUTED (smaller move, wrong-sign p=0.88). Polymarket implied dispersion does not improve on the historical vol the survival book already uses. Polymarket closed as a vol/sizing source. Reproducible in scripts/spike_polymarket_implied_vol.py::exploratory_followup.
chore(B0174): exploratory follow-up â€” implied dispersion has no actionable sizing edge
